category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Ruby as an object-oriented scripting language; source_facts.homepage is ruby-lang.org.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to Ruby, and the official Ruby source repository is ruby/ruby.
